== Notes for [[Item:Q88433|Q88433]] ==

http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01186.htm#0

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per01186.htm#0

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940CB316F1EFBBE49822EF79916C5F6C
geni:6000000002187614287
